steps.title: Express the method's purpose
steps.content: The sentence says Bertozzi devised a method for removing toxic byproducts from click chemistry. The phrase after the blank should explain the purpose of that removal: protecting healthy cells in humans for pharmaceutical treatments.

steps.title: Reject faulty forms
steps.content: Choice B creates a past-participle fragment. Choice C awkwardly adds a second action without showing purpose. Choice D creates a participial phrase that does not clearly state why the method removes toxic byproducts.

steps.title: Use the purpose infinitive
steps.content: The infinitive phrase clearly states the purpose of removing toxic byproducts: to protect healthy cells. The answer is A.
